thought.text: 现在添加关系表达式和相等表达式：

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "old_str": "assignmentExpression
    :   additiveExpression
    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    ;", "new_str": "relationalExpression
    :   additiveExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    ;

equalityExpression
    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|ExclaimEqual) relationalExpression)*
    ;

logicalAndExpression
    :   equalityExpression (AmpAmp equalityExpression)*
    ;

logicalOrExpression
    :   logicalAndExpression (PipePipe logicalAndExpression)*
    ;

assignmentExpression
    :   logicalOrExpression
    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    ;", "summary": "添加关系、相等和逻辑表达式"}

summary: 添加关系、相等和逻辑表达式
